scripts.build: npm run --workspace @superhub/contracts build && npm run --workspace @superhub/sdk build && npm run --workspace @superhub/hub build
scripts.typecheck: npm run --workspace @superhub/contracts build && npm run --workspace @superhub/contracts typecheck && npm run --workspace @superhub/sdk typecheck && npm run --workspace @superhub/hub typecheck
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test $(find tests -type f -name '*.test.mjs' | sort)
